<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<body>
  <form>
    <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="you@example.com">
    <button type="submit">Sign up</button>
  </form>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<body>
  <form>
    <label for="email">Email address</label>
    <input id="email" type="email" name="email">
    <button type="submit">Sign up</button>
  </form>
</body>
</html>
